summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of Housekeeping page redesign from card layout to spreadsheet-style table. All 11 test cases passed. Table renders correctly with proper columns, row click opens edit modal, save functionality works, and all tabs are functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Alternating row colors (bg-white and bg-[#fafaf7]) implemented correctly
Maintenance column is conditional (anyMaint) - only shows if any record has maintenance assigned
Edit modal correctly populates form fields from selected record
useCustomMaint state properly handles custom maintenance person input
passed_tests: TEST 1: All required columns present (Unit, Check-out, Check-in, Cleaning Time, Cleaner, Maintenance, Notes, Status)
TEST 2: Table rows exist with data-testid='cleaning-row' (4 rows found)
TEST 2: Status badge with data-testid='cleaning-status-badge' found
TEST 3: Alternating row colors confirmed (bg-white and bg-[#fafaf7])
TEST 4: Row click opens edit modal dialog
TEST 5: Modal has all form elements (cleaner select, maintenance select, checkbox, save button, notes textarea, 3 time inputs)
TEST 6: Save button works - notes updated and modal closed with 'Updated' toast
TEST 7: Current Housekeepers tab works - lists housekeepers with add button
TEST 8: Housekeeping Leads tab works - lists leads with add button
TEST 9: Tab navigation back to Upcoming Cleanings works
TEST 10: Cleaner dropdown shows options (Unassigned, Maria) and selection works
TEST 11: Mark as Done checkbox toggles correctly and status badge updates from 'Pending' to 'Done'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Housekeeping page table redesign fully tested and working. Table columns: Unit (with Tenant Name), Check-out, Check-in, Cleaning Time, Cleaner, Maintenance (conditional), Notes, Status. Key data-testids: upcoming-cleanings-table, cleaning-row, cleaning-status-badge, hk-edit-cleaner-select, hk-edit-maintenance-select, cleaning-confirmed-checkbox, hk-edit-save-btn, hk-tab-upcoming, hk-tab-housekeepers, hk-tab-leads. All three tabs (Upcoming Cleanings, Current Housekeepers, Housekeeping Leads) work correctly. Edit modal opens on row click and save persists changes.
